title: m2c decompilation scaffold
description: Run the tool-local m2c fork to generate a C-like scaffold for a function or translation unit.
status_message: Tool-local implementation: APIs invoke toolpacks/gamecube-decomp/_impl/gamecube/tools/decomp.py and the vendored m2c package.
limitations: The vendored m2c fork is GPL-3.0 licensed and lives under toolpacks/gamecube-decomp/_impl/gamecube/m2c.
m2c output is a scaffold for understanding control/data flow, not reviewable source and not a substitute for natural decompilation.
Requires pyelftools, pcpp, generated object/asm artifacts, and the colosseum m2ctx.py helper.

usage.agent_guidance: Use for understanding control/data flow only; never paste scaffold output as final source without naturalizing and validating it.
